name: code4food-factory
description: Factory — autonomous spec-driven development. Claude Code develops a fully-specced product alone in daily windows; skills cover speccing (multi-sitting interview + red-team pass, no factory machine required), setup (interview wizard), the backlog vocabulary, and headless verification for unattended sessions. The driver, prompts, and schedulers ship in this plugin's factory/ tree and run from a per-machine runtime clone (see FACTORY.md).
